title: dryopteris aculeata subsp. lobata
intro: Dryopteris aculeata subsp. lobata, also known as the prickly shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris aculeata subsp. lobata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
